obligations.nl_gloss: The input slice is sorted in nondecreasing order.

obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (arr : Arr) (t : Int) (i : Nat), binarySearch arr t = some i → i < arr.length ∧ arr.get? i = some t
obligations.nl_gloss: If the function returns Some i, then i is in range and arr[i] equals the target.

obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (arr : Arr) (t : Int), binarySearch arr t = none → ∀ i, i < arr.length → arr.get? i ≠ some t
obligations.nl_gloss: If the function returns None, the target does not occur anywhere in the slice.

obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (arr : Arr) (t : Int), ∃ r : SearchResult, binarySearch arr t = r
obligations.nl_gloss: The function terminates on every input (existence of a result).
